testimonials.name: Alex M.
testimonials.text: Pixeliora completely unblocked my creative process. I use it to brainstorm environmental designs before painting. The fantasy style is incredible.

testimonials.name: Sarah J.
testimonials.text: We needed custom illustrations for our campaign but didn't have the budget. This tool gave us agency-quality assets in minutes.

testimonials.name: Leo T.
testimonials.text: The prompt understanding is next level. The cyberpunk assets I generated fit perfectly into my indie game's moodboards.

Footer.description: Unlock infinite creativity. Generate breathtaking imagery from text using bleeding-edge AI architecture.

About.title: About Pixeliora
About.description: Pixeliora uses cutting-edge artificial intelligence to transform your textual prompts into vibrant, stunning visual masterpieces. Our mission is to democratize digital art creation.

Contacts.title: Contact Us
Contacts.description: Have questions about Pixeliora? Want to discuss enterprise pricing? We'd love to hear from you.
